description: INVESTIGATION + FIX: Image prompts are missing from EN content plans two days in a row (20260312 and 20260311). Steps: 1) Read data/content_plan_20260312_EN.json and data/content_plan_20260311_EN.json — identify exactly what's wrong with the image_prompt field (null? empty object? missing entirely?). 2) Read agents/creator.md and config/image_prompt_guide.md to understand the full required schema. 3) Read data/strategy_20260312.json for today's strategy inputs. 4) Regenerate data/content_plan_20260312_EN.json from scratch with ALL required fields: full image_prompt objects per schema (tool, prompt 150+ words, negative_prompt, aspect_ratio, meta, subject, outfit, pose, scene, camera, lighting, mood), correct EN captions under 30 chars, empty hashtags array, proper post IDs. 5) Validate the output against all rules in creator.md before writing. 6) Generate HTML report and notify operator. Log what was wrong and what was fixed.
notes: Image prompts have been missing from content plans for 2 consecutive days. This is a quality regression. Creator must produce full image_prompt objects per the schema in creator.md and image_prompt_guide.md. Do not skip or abbreviate any image_prompt fields. Validate the final JSON before writing.
